item.title: Immunovant's FcRn Inhibitor (Phase 3 Thyroid Eye Disease)
item.description:
• Summary: Immunovant reported that its FcRn inhibitor drug candidate did not meet primary endpoints in a pair of Phase 3 trials for Thyroid Eye Disease (TED). This represents a significant clinical setback for the program in this specific autoimmune indication affecting the eyes.
  • MoAs: FcRn (neonatal Fc receptor) inhibitor
  • Sources: Endpoints News
